what: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: Data laboratory assay investigating growth fungal species human faeces effect faecal physicochemical properties bacterial indicator concentrations 14 days post inoculation. Five fungal species tested alongside untreated controls: Pleurotus ostreatus (MG1015, MG1010), Ganoderma lucidum, Stropharia fimicola (F35), Trichoderma harzianum (T22).

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: can install development version fungalgrowth GitHub : Alternatively, can download individual datasets CSV XLSX file table . Click Download CSV. window opens displays CSV browser. Right-click anywhere inside window select “Save Page …”. Save file folder choice.
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("global-health-engineering/fungalgrowth") ## Run the following code in console if you don't have the packages ## install.packages(c("dplyr", "knitr", "readr", "stringr", "gt", "kableExtra")) library(dplyr) library(knitr) library(readr) library(stringr) library(gt) library(kableExtra)

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: datasets capture 14-day laboratory assay designed study fungal mycelium grows human faeces growth alters substrate’s physicochemical microbial properties. Five datasets describe assay end end: experimental setup, characterization inputs (faeces samples fungal inocula), daily time series mycelium growth, endpoint measurements recorded 14 days post inoculation. dataset lazy-loaded ready use soon package attached.

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: dataset experiment_setup contains data experimental setup recorded 0 days post inoculation (0 dpi), linking treatment unit faeces sample fungal inoculum along initial faeces wet weight plate. 132 observations 4 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: dataset experiment_endpoint contains data experimental measurements taken 14 days post inoculation (14 dpi), including faeces wet dry weights, pH, bacterial indicator concentrations (E. coli, Enterococcus, total plate count) treatment unit. 132 observations 7 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: dataset faecal_measurements contains data characterization faeces sample 0 days post inoculation (0 dpi), including total faeces weight, additive composition, pH, water content, bacterial indicator concentrations (E. coli, Enterococcus, total plate count) averaged across three replicates. 6 observations 10 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: dataset inoculum_species contains data fungal inocula used assay, providing mapping inoculum identifier fungal species. 44 observations 2 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: dataset fungal_growth contains time-series observations fungal mycelium growth treatment unit, one row per treatment-observation date. Variables include mycelium area, contamination metrics, growth descriptors recorded timepoint. 990 observations 8 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
code: library(fungalgrowth) library(ggplot2)  ggplot(fungal_growth, aes(x = dpi, y = area_size, group = id_treatment)) +   geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +   labs(     title = "Fungal mycelium growth over time",     x = "Days post inoculation",     y = "Area size (cm²)"   ) +   theme_minimal()

title: Fungal Growth Assay on Human Faeces
text: Data available CC-.

title: experiment_endpoint: Experiment Endpoint Measurements — experiment_endpoint
text: Measurements weight, pH bacterial concentration endpoint.

title: experiment_endpoint: Experiment Endpoint Measurements — experiment_endpoint
text: tibble 132 rows 7 variables id_treatment Unique identifier experimental treatment unit. wet_weight Wet weight faeces sample day 14 post inoculation (14 dpi). dry_weight Dry weight faeces sample day 14 post inoculation (14 dpi); derived wet weight water content. ecoli_concentration E. coli concentration day 14 post inoculation (14 dpi). enterococcus_concentration Enterococcus concentration day 14 post inoculation (14 dpi). total_plate_count_concentration Total plate count concentration day 14 post inoculation (14 dpi). ph pH faeces sample day 14 post inoculation (14 dpi).

title: experiment_setup: Experiment Setup — experiment_setup
text: Fungal inoculum, faecals sample wet weight experimental setup.

title: experiment_setup: Experiment Setup — experiment_setup
text: tibble 132 rows 4 variables id_treatment Unique identifier experimental treatment unit. id_inoc Identifier fungal inoculum used treatment; joins inoculum_species. id_faeces Identifier faeces sample used treatment; joins faecal_measurements. wet_weight Wet weight faeces sample day 0 post inoculation (0 dpi).

title: faecal_measurements: Feacal Samples Measurements — faecal_measurements
text: Weight, additive, pH, bactial water concentration measurements faecal samples start experiment.

title: faecal_measurements: Feacal Samples Measurements — faecal_measurements
text: tibble 6 rows 10 variables id_faeces Identifier faeces sample. weight_total Total weight faeces collected additive 0 dpi. weight_additive Weight additive mixed faeces 0 dpi. additive Type additive mixed faeces 0 dpi. additive_ratio Proportion additive relative total mixture weight 0 dpi. ph pH faeces-additive mixture collection (0 dpi). water_content_mean Mean water content faeces sample day 0 post inoculation (0 dpi); mean 3 replicates. ecoli_concentration_mean Mean E. coli concentration day 0 post inoculation (0 dpi); mean 3 replicates. enterococcus_concentration_mean Mean Enterococcus concentration day 0 post inoculation (0 dpi); mean 3 replicates. total_plate_count_concentration_mean Mean total plate count concentration day 0 post inoculation (0 dpi); mean 3 replicates.

title: fungal_growth: Fungal Growth — fungal_growth
text: Measurements fungal growth contamination across several timepoints.

title: fungal_growth: Fungal Growth — fungal_growth
text: tibble 990 rows 8 variables id_treatment Identifier experimental treatment unit; joins experiment_setup experiment_endpoint. date Date growth observation measurement. dpi Days post inoculation; days elapsed measurement first measurement treatment. area_size Area fungal mycelium observation date. nr_contaminations Number macroscopically distinct contaminating fungi observed timepoint. total_contamination_area Total area contamination summed across observed contamination spots timepoint. reproductive_structures Coded indicator reproductive structures observed timepoint. growth_description Coded description fungal growth timepoint; numeric score recorded observation.

title: inoculum_species: Inoculum Species — inoculum_species
text: Fungal inoculum species used experiment.

title: inoculum_species: Inoculum Species — inoculum_species
text: tibble 44 rows 2 variables id_inoc Identifier fungal inoculum. species Fungal species used inoculum.
